candidate_definition_hints.text: Install sing-box/xray and configure vless / tuic / hysteria2 / shadowtls for reality or tls (letsencrypt) over different transport protocols (tcp, http, grpc and websocket) with user management capability in CLI, TUI and Telegram bot by a single command in docker compose!
Install and configure vless with reality or TLS on your linux server by executing a single command!

candidate_glosses.text: Install and configure vless with reality or TLS on your linux server by executing a single command!
